message:
fix: review passes 17-22 — 50+ bugs across correctness, data integrity, and performance

Key fixes by category:

Correctness (HIGH):
- R2Partitioner finalize() returned wrong keys (data loss on spill)
- Worker DO hashJoinPartition missing RIGHT join support
- wasmResultToQMCB + lanceResultToQMCB dropped vector column data (QMCB corruption)
- executeJoin skipped post-join operators (window, computed, distinct, subquery)
- FragmentDO pipeline double-aggregated (COUNT became "count of groups")
- QueryDO multi-fragment dataset discovery (first query scanned only first fragment)
- Window functions computed per-fragment instead of globally
- ProjectOperator stripped window/computed column aliases
- LazyResultHandle never applied drop() columns

Data integrity (MEDIUM):
- canSkipPage BigInt crash on NaN/Infinity min/max (5 coercion sites)
- WasmAggregateOperator alloc failure read garbage / inflated AVG denominator
- r2-spill mixed number/bigint columns silently encoded as 0
- MaterializedExecutor applied projections before sort
- parseLanceResult break exited switch not for loop (silent data corruption)
- mergeQueryResults wrong columns metadata for aggregation path
- VipCache set() didn't clear pendingEviction (deleted fresh entries)

Infrastructure:
- R2Partitioner cleanup() paginated R2 list (>1000 objects)
- FsSpill cleanup in try/finally (temp file leak on error)
- parseInt NaN on non-numeric manifest filenames (3 sites)
- PG wire: malformed startup stuck state, transaction keyword prefix matching
- query-schema filter value rejected booleans from REST API
- count()/exists() offset/limit regressions
- show() BigInt crash, createFromJSON nested objects
- NaN comparator antisymmetry (mergeCompare — 5th missed site)
- Arrow IPC 64-bit offsets for LargeUtf8/LargeBinary
- CSV/JSON BigInt precision for large int64 values

755/755 tests passing, 0 TypeScript errors.
